specialist_assignments.rationale: All code/backend tasks. Domain tags (backend, typescript, game-engine, state-machine, immutable-state, narrative, scene-graph, rpg, rest-api, persistence) match task domains for all 10 tasks.

Narrative/game-design and narrative/content tasks. Domain tags (narrative, game-design, scene-design, branching-narrative, choice-design, consequence-system, personality-gates, scene-graph) match both task domains.

execution_order.rationale: All code/backend tasks (T1-T9, T12) with no cross-specialist dependencies. Handles type system, engine modules, synergy system, REST API, and integration validation.

T10 (narrative design) has no code dependencies but T11 (scene JSON authoring) requires the scene engine JSON format from T2-T3 game-backend-engine blueprints. Running after Phase 1 ensures schema is defined before authoring.

dependencies.reason: T11 (Act 1 Scene JSON Authoring) must conform to the scene engine JSON format defined in T2 (Scene Graph Engine) and T3 (Choice & Consequence Engine) blueprints.
